mapper.select: select id, employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status from employment_user where id = #{id}
select * from employment_user where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
insert into employment_user
id,
employment_id, user_id,
name,
phone,
introduce,
resume,
create_time, deleted,
reply_time,
reply_content,
reply_user,
type,
reply_status,
user_status,
#{id},
#{employmentId}, #{userId},
#{name},
#{phone},
#{introduce},
#{resume},
#{createTime}, #{deleted},
#{replyTime},
#{replyContent},
#{replyUser},
#{type},
#{replyStatus},
#{userStatus},

insert into employment_user(id, employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.employmentId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.introduce}, #{entity.resume}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.deleted}, #{entity.replyTime}, #{entity.replyContent}, #{entity.replyUser}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.replyStatus}, #{entity.userStatus})

insert into employment_user(employment_id, user_id, name, phone, introduce, resume, create_time, deleted, reply_time, reply_content, reply_user, type, reply_status, user_status) values
(#{entity.employmentId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.phone}, #{entity.introduce}, #{entity.resume}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.deleted}, #{entity.replyTime}, #{entity.replyContent}, #{entity.replyUser}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.replyStatus}, #{entity.userStatus})
on duplicate key update employment_id = values(employment_id), user_id = values(user_id), name = values(name), phone = values(phone), introduce = values(introduce), resume = values(resume), create_time = values(create_time), deleted = values(deleted), reply_time = values(reply_time), reply_content = values(reply_content), reply_user = values(reply_user), reply_status = values(reply_status), user_status = values(user_status)
mapper.update:
update employment_user
employment_id = #{employmentId},
user_id = #{userId},
name = #{name},
phone = #{phone},
introduce = #{introduce},
resume = #{resume},
create_time = #{createTime},
deleted = #{deleted},
reply_time = #{replyTime},
reply_content = #{replyContent},
reply_user = #{replyUser},
type = #{type},
reply_status = #{replyStatus},
user_status = #{userStatus},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from employment_user where deleted = 0
mapper.delete:
delete from employment_user where user_id = #{userId} and employment_id = #{employmentId}
and type = #{type}
